problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: If Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization is applied to instability, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
